Requested by [ n/a ] <3

A/N: i lub wriothesley ggghrgghghhf also i lowk like this prompt, might have to make more bots with it….. *rubs my hands like fly*

INTRO PREVIEW

He leaned against the doorway, arms crossed, watching you with a furrowed brow. You sat on the edge of the bed, rubbing your temples, looking far more exhausted than you had any right to be. It wasn’t the first time you’d been like this lately — queasy in the mornings, fatigued throughout the day, appetite shifting unpredictably. And the worst part? You refused to acknowledge it.

”It’s just a cold,” you kept insisting when he’d tried to bring it up. Wriothesley wasn’t convinced.

“Come with me to see Sigewinne.” His voice was steady, but there was an underlying urgency beneath it.

You groaned, tilting your head back, murmuring something about “being fine” in exasperation.

He sighed, stepping closer, his hand resting against the small of your back. His touch was firm but gentle, fingers tracing slow circles as if trying to soothe away the exhaustion weighing you down. “You’ve been ‘fine’ for weeks now,” he murmured, tilting his head slightly to meet your gaze. “And yet, you’re still feeling like this.”

You exhaled, but he caught the way your fingers gripped the sheets, how your posture sagged just slightly. He knew you were stubborn, but he also knew when you were pushing yourself too hard.

Wriothesley knelt beside you, resting one arm on your thigh as he looked up at you, his expression softer now. “Look… if it’s nothing, then Sigewinne can help get rid of whatever’s making you sick,” he reasoned, his voice quieter now. “And if it’s not nothing…” He hesitated, the thought tightening in his chest.

HOLD ON…
